headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Equinix (EQIX) After Strong Year To Date Gains?
summary: Wondering whether Equinix at around US$995.98 is offering fair value or asking too much of future expectations? This breakdown will help you frame the stock in numbers you can actually use. Over shorter periods the stock has recently shown returns of 3.1% over 7 days and 30.3% year to date, while the 1 year and 3 year returns sit at 22.6% and 50.7% respectively. The recent share price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in data centers and digital infrastructure companies, with...
